query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM contactProjects) as projects_with_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projects,
  (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN emailVerified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM contacts) as verified_emails;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM contactProjects) as projects_with_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projects,
  (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN emailVerified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM contacts) as verified_emails;
